name: Certificates Using Weak Signature Algorithms
description: Identifies certificates using deprecated signature algorithms like SHA-1 or MD5
query: SELECT id, domain, issuer, signature_algorithm FROM certificates WHERE signature_algorithm IN ('SHA1withRSA', 'MD5withRSA', 'SHA1withECDSA')
remediation: Replace the certificate with one using SHA-256 or stronger signature algorithm. Contact your certificate authority to issue a new certificate.
